title: Add NVM read integration to oscore_ctx_set_sender_seq for non-EUI64 contexts and reboot safety
description: If read_cb available and context not yet initialized, attempt to load latest SSN from NVM in set_sender_seq (fallback for contexts without EUI64). Bump sender_seq safely if NVM read fails or to prevent reuse. Update oscore_init and context creation accordingly.
close_reason: Implemented NVM read in oscore_ctx_set_sender_seq for non-EUI64 contexts with safe bump on read failure; updated oscore_init to reset callbacks and test assertions; tests now pass
